name: trustloop
description: Intercept, audit, and enforce kill-switch rules on every tool call your agent makes before execution. Full audit trail at app.trustloop.live.
author: Soji Muyiwa (@SMJAI)

requiredEnv.name: TRUSTLOOP_API_KEY
requiredEnv.description: Your TrustLoop API key. Get one free at app.trustloop.live

externalConnections.purpose: Check tool call against governance rules and kill-switches before execution. Returns allowed:true or allowed:false.
externalConnections.dataTransmitted: Tool name + arguments only (secrets auto-redacted by trustloop-check.js before transmission using pattern matching). No file contents, conversation history, system prompts, or credentials are ever sent.
